text.title: Creational Design Patterns Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the creational-patterns methodology end-to-end.

step.name: locate-hotspot
step.action: Find construction sites with ≥3 params, runtime variants, or shared state.

step.name: pick-pattern
step.action: Decide Factory Method (one product) / Abstract Factory (product family) / Builder (multi-step) / DI (general).
step.decision-gate: If Singleton chosen, escalate — usually a refactor candidate.

step.name: wire-di
step.action: Configure DI container with scope (request/app/singleton); document scope choice.

step.name: rewrite-fixtures
step.action: Move fixtures to factory/builder produced by DI test scope.

step.name: wire-lint
step.action: Add lint blocking direct `new`/`Type(...)` of cross-context types outside factories/DI.
